title: 7 Herbal Teas For Jaw Lock
description: Zingiber officinale teas contains compounds like gingerols and shogaols. These bioactive constituents have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which help with pain relief. Gingerols, in particular, have been shown to inhibit the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that cause pain and inflammation in the body. By reducing inflammation and pain, gingerols help to relax the muscles in the jaw, providing relief from jaw lock. The analgesic properties of ...
